feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Fiori RAP display [object Object]
entry.content:
Hello everyone!
I am facing an issue when displaying the RAP application, as shown below:

But when I refresh the browser, it works normally.

When I preview the application in SAP BAS, it works fine, but when I preview it in the Eclipse tool, [object Object] is displayed.

How can I fix this issue?

Thanks!

entry.title: How to hide delete option from BAS dev space?
entry.content:
I have sap business application studio service where created a Dev Space. There is a delete option, however I would like to remove 'delete' option from there.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Connection Rejected Error in CAP
entry.content:
I created a CAP application in SAP BAS in SAP Trial account. When I try to create connection it is showing this error.

I started the server using the command cds watch and when I try to click send request in the .http file shown here getting the marked error.

entry.title: Error retrieving edmx for [destination] - Fiori Project in Eclipse to BAS
entry.content:
Hello.

I am trying the 'Create Fiori Project' functionality from the Service Binding (ABAP Cloud) in Eclipse. But when the Business Application Studio opens, I get the error:

"Error retrieving edmx for [s4h]. Unable to launch the Fiori generator from ADT. Check output logs [SAP Fiori Tools - Application Modeler] for more information."

What am I missing? My settings are as following.

Service Binding:

Eclipse external IDE configuration:

SAP Destination:

Error BAS:

SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP Business Application Studio

entry.title: Issue with local annotations in sap bas
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create local annotations in the SAP BAS using open guided development in the project. When i try to table column(UI Line item) , the entity set is greyedout like below 

 

Also getting the warning message "The guide is not compatable with the current project and will not work as intened". Please help me on this.

entry.title: Local annotations are reflecting in sap smart controls
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create the fiori local annotations in my custom fiori app. I have created the annotation file under annotation folder and added UI.LineItem but its not reflecting. 

Below is the code in manifest.json file 

 

and below is the annotation code 

 

Even in the network tab the annotations file is getting loaded without any issue.

And when preview the application i dont see any columns in the smart table.

KR,

Anji

entry.title: Connecting Shopify to CAPM Issue
entry.content:
Hello All,


I’m currently working on a CAPM (Cloud Application Programming Model) project, where I’m trying to integrate Shopify using its API endpoints. The goal is to retrieve data by passing query parameters while using authentication credentials such as:

  • X-Shopify-Access-Token
  • Content-Type: application/json

Everything seems straightforward, but when I attempt to make a request, I keep running into this error:
read tcp 100.96.8.158:41620->23.227.38.74:443: read: connection reset by peer\

  • Checked API Credentials – The X-Shopify-Access-Token is valid, and the headers are correctly set.
  • Verified API Endpoint – The Shopify API URL and query parameters seem correct.
  • Tested with Postman – Surprisingly, the request works fine in Postman, but fails within CAPM.
  • Network & Firewall Debugging –
    • No restrictions from my end.
    • The Shopify endpoint is reachable via browser and Postman.
    • No VPN or proxy causing issues.
  • Tried Different HTTP Libraries –
    • Used both axios and node-fetch, but got the same error.
    • The issue persists in both @SAP-cloud-sdk/http-client and direct http.request().
  • Looked at Shopify Rate Limits –
    • Shopify enforces rate limits, but I’m well under the threshold.
    • Even after waiting, the request fails again.

      Here I'm sharing the screenshots of it and code which I'm using Can anyone help on this?

Sample Code:



Issue:

Thanks,
Manoj Kumar.

entry.title: Value help search in Smart Filterbar
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have requirement to add valuehelpsearch in the smart filterbar. I have already created custom fiori app which has smartfilterbar and smarttable which are refering some "abcentitySet" like below 

When i click on CompCode filter its not showing the search option , requirement is to search by Id and Name and get the results. So user can select 

Now my requirement is when user clicks on Compcode filter it should call diff  "xyzentityset" and display user to select. Below is the expected result

 

Can someone please throw some light on this and how can i achieve it ? 

KR,

Anji

entry.title: Unable to access "SAP Business Application Studio" after using it few days, throwing "Access Denied"
entry.content:
Unable to access "SAP Business Application Studio" after using it few days, throwing "Access Denied" suddenly.

I have necessary roles of BAS Administration as well as BAS developer roles to my account i logged in. I am using BTP trail account. Something got changed while trying to follow the golden path [removed by moderator].

entry.title: Error: Fiori tool guided development with OData service v2
entry.content:
Hello,

I recentely found the sap fiori tools: guided deveopment does not work with Odata service V2 in VS Code and BAS. Do you have any solution for that? 

(It works well with the odata V4 )

Version:

Sap fiori tools: 1.16.4

VS code: 1.97.2

nodeJs:20.18.1

Thanks in advance,

SAP Fiori tools SAP Business Application Studio #visual studio code

@sinead_roche  thanks for your comment, here you are the error and the metadata file regarding the odata service V2

PS: it does not bug for the service odata created within SEGW, the one which does not work is created using RAP.

@hitesh_parmar Thanks for your response, i also tried to create new project using xml file from my side, it doest not work, and .zip file is not supported here , you could get from my git : https://github.com/yangyvon/sap.git

entry.title: In BAS, ui5-deploy.yaml files in all applications have an "Unable to load schema ..." error.
entry.content:
Out of the blue last week, in all applications that I load into BAS, the ui5-deploy.yaml is registering the following error: 

Unable to load schema from 'https://sap.github.io/ui5-tooling/schema/ui5.yaml.json': Request vscode/content failed unexpectedly without providing any details. YAML(768)

I haven't made any changes myself that would cause this for every application, but I do believe the error showed up after an SAP update to BAS. So far, research that I've done hasn't turned up any answers. Anybody have any ideas?

entry.title: smarttable sorting is not working
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have smart table where on load some data is getting populated , now i want to sort the data of the smart table without calling the backend. 

Is there any setting or property where smart table automatically does the sorting and filtering ? 

KR,

entry.title: CDS View to get Purchase Requisition Approval Detail in SAP Public Cloud System
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Please recommend us CDS view to be use in Eclipse ADT for purchase requisition workflow approval details in SAP public cloud system which include Status, notes during approval, processor, approval date etc.

We found below service which is returning the results as we need however we could not use in ADT or when used in Business Application Studio we could not deploy the application.

  • "/sap/opu/odata/sap/SWF_FLEX_DEF_SRV/GetApplicationWorkflowInstances"

Regards,

Iftikhar Ali

entry.title: SAM2410 : Code 500 at init/sync as soon as a CIM extension is added to the standard app
entry.content:
Hello guys,

I'm upgrading from SAM2305 to SAM2410.

Metadata : SAM2410 + OSS note 3543925  - App version 2410.0.2 - MDK : 24-7-6-001

The standard application works perfectly well now and I began to add a few specifics using CIM and extension .

Very simple customization : Only change the Display Name of the app in Global/Passport and change some translation i18n files. Nothing dangerous.

Since I deployed the "CIM application" , I have issues with a 500 error code, in the client, at initialization or at Synchronization.

Nothing shows in a /IWFND/TRACES. No warning/error in the BTP logs.

I'm working with Business Application Studio and the deployment of the "CIM app" is OK (Bundle OK, update of the app in Mobile Services).

App is tested on iOS devices.

Any help ? any ideas ?

I have a clientlog but it's too big a file to post it

entry.title: Fiori Elements Apps deployed from Business Application Studio not showing in HTML5 APPLICATIONS BTP
entry.content:
Hi,

I am following a tutorial: Welcome to the Developing and Extending SAP Fiori Elements Apps openSAP samples 

available at https://github.com/SAP-samples/fiori-elements-opensap/tree/main

I am stuck in week 3 unit 4.

Hands-on exercise for week 3 unit 4: Deploying your SAP Fiori elements app 

So far, I have followed everything as described in the tutorial. When deployed from Business Application Studio, the app does not appear in HTML5 Applications in BTP Cockpit and content Manager work zone.

I tried https://me.sap.com/notes/0003228331 but this didn't work.

While searching for solution I came across this https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/after-deploying-to-cloud-foundry-log-shows-successful-but-html5-url-not/qaq-p/12394072#M4638454 - but this also didn't work.

Please help in this regard.

@jlong 

@SAPCommunity 

@dennis_koehler 

@SAPSupport

entry.title: Attach paste in adaptation project
entry.content:
Does anybody know why method attachpaste doesnt work with adaptatino project? This is my code

override: {
            onInit: function() {
var oTable = sap.ui.getCore().byId("cus.sd.salesorderv2.manage::SalesOrderManageObjectPage--fe::table::_Item::LineItem");

                if (oTable) {
                    oTable.attachPaste(this.onPasteEAN, this); // Attach paste event
}}}
onPasteEAN: function() {
            console.log("onPasteEAN");
           
        },
 
it should console log everytime where i paste something in table but it doesnt. Anybody knows what's the problem. link to method https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/api/sap.m.Table%23methods/attachPaste

entry.title: Can not extend lagacy sap ui5 app in VSCode ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts;

I'm trying to extend sapui5 standar App "Approve Purchase Orders - F0402 " in VScode for an ECC system . But the following error is show up 

My question is: if I switch to BAS, will I face the same issue again? Does BAS guarantee the same functionality as SAP Web IDE for extending legacy SAP apps as before?

Regards

Nadim

entry.title: Application Passcode for MDK Extension Can't Generate Passcode Error 400 This Feature is Not Enabled
entry.content:
Hello

I was hoping if someone could clarify some information regarding the process of creating an MDK app extension as the process has changed since I have previously performed this. I am planning on creating an extension folder for my SSAM project.

  1. Regarding the Mobile Application URL, would this be the same as the site domain listed in the Application Links section of the Mobile Services app that the MDK project is connected to? I see that the Mobile Services documentation, it lists that this URL can be found in the Connectivity section by launching one of the destinations in the browser. I believe this to be correct but was hoping to verify this information.
    https://help.sap.com/doc/f53c64b93e5140918d676b927a3cd65b/Cloud/en-US/docs-en/guides/features/backend-connectivity/admin/config.html
  2. For generating the application passcode, clicking the link to generate the code results in a 400 error stating that the feature is not enabled and to contact the Mobile Services app team for further instructions. As I have access to the Mobile Services app, I was hoping to enable this feature for myself. Where would I enable this feature in Mobile Services? I do not currently see any place to do so there nor any instructions in the Mobile Services documentation.

Thank you for your help and take care.

Mark

entry.title: Unable to use SAP HANA Application Migration Assistant Template in SAP BAS
entry.content:
Hello Community,

When I am trying to migrate my artifacts or Data from NEO to CAP Using the Template provided by SAP i.e. SAP HANA APPLICATION ASSISTANT but I am facing the below issue while trying to select the source type as "Delivery Unit" and If I select the Package name I get the same issue when I enter any package name.

I was referring the details from below link : 
Migration

entry.title: Error Connecting ABAP Cloud to SAP Business Application Studio (BAS)
entry.content:
Error Connecting ABAP Cloud to SAP Business Application Studio (BAS)

Issue

When trying to connect ABAP Cloud to SAP Business Application Studio (BAS), the following error occurs:

"Could not get v2 and v4 services for ''."

This issue arises when attempting to use the Service Center in BAS to access the destination.

Destination Configuration

Below is the configured destination (sensitive details have been hidden):

#clientSecret=<< Existing password/certificate removed on export >>
#
#Sat Mar 08 12:16:11 UTC 2025
tokenServiceURLType=Dedicated
clientId=***************
Description=Destination generated by App Studio for Cloud Foundry Abap service instance: 'teste-ooo-pedrao', Do not remove.
tokenServiceURL=https://**************.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token
WebIDEEnabled=true
URL=https://**************.abap.us10.hana.ondemand.com/
Name=abap-cloud-teste-ooo-pedrao
WebIDEUsage=odata_abap,dev_abap,abap_cloud
Type=HTTP
HTML5.DynamicDestination=true
Authentication=OAuth2UserTokenExchange
HTML5.Timeout=60000
ProxyType=Internet

Steps Followed

The destination was created following the official SAP guide:
Creating Destination to ABAP System for SAP Business Application Studio.

However, when trying to use the Service Center in BAS, the error appears.

Possible Causes & Troubleshooting

What could be causing this issue? How can we ensure the destination is properly recognized by BAS and Service Center?
